edges.rule: Binary search tree is discussed after recursion
Activation record is introduced in the context of recursion
Stack is used to trace recursion
Depth first search uses stack, which is introduced in the context of recursion
Activation record is created within the stack context
Instruction pointer helps in understanding stack operations, which are used to trace recursion
Space complexity is discussed after activation record is introduced
Time complexity and recursive equation are discussed in the context of recursion
